commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content:
And when David had finished offering holocausts, and pacifics, he (a) blessed the people in the name of our Lord.
(a) Not only king David being a holy Prophet, but any other Superior might bless his subjects.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Sarvia. The honour shown to the sisters of David is unusual. The father of the three valiant children of Sarvia is no where specified.
